class.name: NavigationMeshAreaPolygon3D
class.brief_description: An axis-aligned area with a projected shape of a closed polygon to affect navigation mesh geometry and traversal cost (when baked). [b]Note:[/b] To guarantee that the area affects the intended [NavigationMesh], make sure that 1. the area's origin is as close as possible to the source geometry, and 2. the [member NavigationMeshArea3D.navigation_layers] are different from the [NavigationRegion3D] you intend to bake with.

method.name: are_vertices_clockwise
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if [member vertices] are winded in clockwise order.

method.name: are_vertices_valid
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if [member vertices] create a valid, not self-overlapping shape.

members.member: Sets how much the projected area shape is extruded along the positive y-axis starting from its global position.
The vertices that define the outline of the projected area shape.
